[et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ _builder_version=”4.24.0″ _module_preset=”default” custom_padding=”25px||60px||false|false” border_width_top=”1px” border_color_top=”#2B59C0″ border_color_bottom=”#2b59c0″ global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_row column_structure=”1_2,1_2″ use_custom_gutter=”on” make_equal=”on” _builder_version=”4.24.0″ _module_preset=”default” max_width=”1110px” hover_enabled=”0″ global_colors_info=”{}” sticky_enabled=”0″ custom_padding=”0px||||false|false”][et_pb_column type=”1_2″ _builder_version=”4.24.0″ _module_preset=”default” hover_enabled=”0″ global_colors_info=”{}” custom_css_main_element=”margin: auto;” sticky_enabled=”0″][et_pb_gallery gallery_ids=”3999,3873″ fullwidth=”on” _builder_version=”4.24.0″ _module_preset=”default” auto=”on” auto_speed=”3000″ hover_enabled=”0″ global_colors_info=”{}” sticky_enabled=”0″][/et_pb_gallery][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=”1_2″ _builder_version=”4.24.0″ _module_preset=”default” custom_padding=”108px||||false|false” custom_padding_tablet=”0px||||false|false” custom_padding_phone=”0px||||false|false” custom_padding_last_edited=”on|tablet” hover_enabled=”0″ global_colors_info=”{}” sticky_enabled=”0″][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.24.0″ _module_preset=”default” text_font=”Gruppo|700|||||||” text_font_size=”21px” header_font=”Gruppo|600||on|||||” header_text_align=”left” header_text_color=”#232323″ header_font_size=”25px” header_line_height=”1.3em” header_2_font=”Gruppo|700||on|||||” header_2_font_size=”35px” header_4_font=”Oswald|700||on|||||” header_4_text_align=”center” header_4_text_color=”#171a25″ header_4_font_size=”40px” header_4_letter_spacing=”-0.2px” custom_margin=”||19px|||” header_2_font_size_tablet=”35px” header_2_font_size_phone=”25px” header_2_font_size_last_edited=”on|phone” header_4_font_size_tablet=”” header_4_font_size_phone=”30px” header_4_font_size_last_edited=”on|phone” locked=”off” global_colors_info=”{}”]

Compression Bag

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.24.0″ _module_preset=”default” custom_margin=”||14px|||” global_colors_info=”{}”]

The Flow compression bag will help to fold and store your glider in a compact way while maintaining the shape of your glider. It can also be used as a standard concertina bag. Easy to fold design to facilitate storage and transport with 8 compression clips, riser pocket and zipper. After folding and zipped-up, the volume is compressed to a bag that measures 67cm x 32cm.

 

  • Weight:  275g
  • Length:  255cm / 67cm

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section]
